given: verifier keeps an open-periods authorization finding when detectorId or groupId is org-scoped but project access is never checked

candidate.title: Open-periods endpoint lacks project access checks
candidate.description: The endpoint resolves detectorId or groupId by organization only and returns group open-period activity without checking whether the caller can access the target project.
candidate.verification: Source: request query parameters detectorId and groupId. Sink: Response returns open period IDs for the resolved group. Boundary: helper methods validate organization_id but never call a request access check for detector.project or group.project.
